steps.mechanism: Three historical instances show consistent pattern: March 18, 2024 hike → -22.28% decline; July 31, 2024 hike → -26.63% decline; January 24, 2025 hike → -30.34% decline. Japanese monetary tightening triggers risk-off sentiment in crypto markets, potentially via yen carry trade unwinding or reduced global liquidity

steps.mechanism: BOJ rate hikes attract demand for yen, pushing JPY higher → JPY appreciation signals tighter funding/liquidity conditions, compresses carry profitability → policy divergence reduces carry profitability, triggers liquidation of yen-funded positions → unwinding reduces demand/liquidity for risk assets, forces BTC selling

relationships.mechanism: BOJ rate hikes attract demand for yen, pushing JPY higher → JPY appreciation signals tighter funding/liquidity conditions, compresses carry profitability → policy divergence reduces carry profitability, triggers liquidation of yen-funded positions → unwinding reduces demand/liquidity for risk assets, forces BTC selling
relationships.source_attribution: CoinDesk (all steps), @TedPillows (historical precedent: Jul 2024 hike → BTC crash 65,000→50,000)
